texto: Growing up in a family of gamblers, daredevils and practical jokers, I've learned a lot about timing and its first cousin, dumb luck, concepts I was introduced to while still in the womb.
explicacao: Citação de Toby Speed sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Growing up in a family of gamblers, daredevils and practical jokers, I've learned a lot about tim…” articula humor, mystery, growing em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como mystery.
